title: DragonHRT
body:
## What is this?
This mod is an addon to [Ice and fire community edition](https://modrinth.com/mod/iceandfire-ce). It allows you to change your dragon's gender using some new items. Your dragon's transition won't be instant, instead they are applied a status effect and when that timer ends (40 mins) they'll be the opposite gender. If you change your mind you can use hormone blockers on your dragon to cancel the transition whilst it is happening.

## What's in it?

### ![The texture for the estrogen item](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f7802de2d7d4ffccea7ecf54b6be3ce41e02ba14.png) Dragon Estrogen
Changes your dragon from male to female!

### ![The texture for the testosterone item](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/be5939b1046b6cc22ec82d15dd60709b8eef12d3.png) Dragon Testosterone
Changes your dragon from female to male!

### ![The texture for the hormone blocker](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5d195a44610876b2049bc2c6b86f368929c46b05.png) Hormone blocker
Cancels your dragon's transition
